etymology.description: [ๆญข] footprint pointing up -> stylized as ้พฐ
etymology.interpretation: The character ้พฐ(yรน, 'stylized feet') is derived from the pictogram of a footprint pointing upwards. Unlike similar characters that point in different directions, ้พฐ uniquely evolved as an upward-pointing stylization, emphasizing its representation of feet in a general form.
